blended.narrative: Cascade Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,006 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F, winds around 23 mph. Expect powder.
